description: A social media editor wants to know which platform (Twitter, Facebook, Reddit, etc.) is driving the most traffic to the website.

nodes.task_description: Open the web analytics platform and navigate to the 'Acquisition' or 'Referral Traffic' report.
Set the date range for the last 30 days.

expected_outcome.value: The report is filtered for the correct time period.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the report to identify the top 5 social media referral sources by number of sessions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a ranked list of the most effective social platforms for driving traffic.
